home.title: UltraModul Enterprise Platform
home.subtitle: Zero Amnesia. Zero Redundancy.
home.welcome: Welcome to the Active Identity Console

iam.title: Identity & Access Matrix
iam.desc: Centralized management of all user permissions in one console. All activities are automatically monitored by the Panopticon Logbook.
iam.ztDesc: All authorization changes in this console will be permanently recorded into the Audit Log ledger.

testbus.alertSignal: Danger signal from Nerve Module! (Inter-Communication Example)
testbus.pageSubtitle: Dummy Module (Module A) Sending Data to Header (Module B)
testbus.mfDesc: This page absolutely does NOT import `Header` code. However, if you press the button below, the Bell in the top right corner of the entire app will chime. This module is registered invisibly via the Module Registry.
testbus.inputPlaceholder: Type intelligence secret to throw across modules...

public.waitRoomDesc: Your identity is under strict escort and automatic/IAM verification. Please patiently wait for activation.

pengaduan.title: Public Complaint Service
pengaduan.desc: Submit complaints and reports directly to the related unit. Fully monitored by logbook.
pengaduan.successDesc: Your complaint ticket is strictly bound to your Universal ID and dispatched to the Multi-Channel Gateway. Keep monitoring its status.
pengaduan.placeholder: Explain the exact time, location, and individuals involved...

maintenance.title: Aegis Database Panopticon
maintenance.desc: Ultra-secure bunker for 1-click database maintenance. DANGER: Extreme actions possible.

evolution.title: Data Evolution Center
evolution.desc: World-class Quarterly Performance Routine. 1-Way Linear Stepper Protocol.

omniforge.title: The Omni-Forge
omniforge.desc: Dual-Way Conversion Terminal & Universal Data Repair Sabotage Engine.
omniforge.healerDesc: Our Omni-Healer engine will scan for orphaned relations, broken UTF-8 encoding, missing commas in CSV, and illegal schema types, then automatically stitch them back.
omniforge.serverDesc: The operation was performed securely on the Next.js Server Instance. No mock data was used. Your operation hit the physical SQLite tables.

warroom.title: Nexus Vault
warroom.emptyVaultDesc: No Policy Folders have been created yet. PUM is a Blank Canvas. Please create a new Folder to simulate a specific scenario.
warroom.deleteMapPrompt: Destroy this Folder and all its data?
warroom.oracleReady: Oracle System active. I am analyzing the {folderName} folder. Give your instructions.
warroom.oracleResponse: Based on the matrix settings in Folder {folderName}, the trend shows a strong correlation according to the assembled formula.

profile.title: Identity Vault
profile.rootWarning: The SYSTEM_ROOT account is an emergency bypass. This profile cannot be modified from the web interface for absolute security reasons.
profile.passwordMismatch: New Password confirmation does not match.
